name: Chef Arif Rahman
bio: Specializing in traditional Bengali feasts for large gatherings. Known for authentic flavours and generous portions.

name: Chef Salim Hossain
bio: Expert in Asian cuisine with a focus on dietary restrictions. Every dish can be customised for your needs.

name: Chef Marco D'Souza
bio: Trained in fine-dining Italian cuisine. Perfect for romantic dinners and sophisticated gatherings.

name: Chef Priya Das
bio: Plant-based culinary expert crafting delicious continental and Italian dishes for health-conscious food lovers.

name: Chef Jamal Uddin
bio: Master of the grill. From backyard BBQs to large outdoor events, every dish is packed with smoky flavour.

name: Chef Rina Akhter
bio: Bringing the taste of homemade Bengali comfort food to your table. Perfect for intimate family dinners.

name: Chef Tanvir Islam
bio: Asian cuisine specialist with extensive catering experience. Handles corporate events and large buffets seamlessly.

name: Chef Elena Gomes
bio: International chef with 15 years of experience in fine dining and pastry. An unforgettable gourmet experience.

name: Chef Hasan Ali
bio: Fusion cuisine expert blending continental and Mediterranean flavours. Great for parties and buffet-style dining.

name: Chef Fahim Karim
bio: Affordable BBQ and American-style grilling with full dietary accommodation. Great value for casual get-togethers.
